title: Expanding Ball DNA Toy - Breathing Ball Toy for Sensory Stimulation - Ideal for ADHD & Autism - Adult Novelty Stress Relief Toy (Large)
features: 【Colorful and Expandable】The puzzle ball has a variety of beautiful colors, which can be opened and expanded, and then it can also be shrunk back to its original size.
【Reusable and Durable】The Breathing Ball is made of eco-friendly ABS material, which is reusable, durable, smooth, edges and smooth for kids to play.

【Educational and Imaginative】Colourful balls will enhance the cognitive competence of colors and creativity of your babies.Help cultivate children's imagination, creativity, thinking ability, memory and hands-on ability.

【Effective and Fun】Novel Expansion Ball is great for kids and adults with anxiety, concentration and fidgeting at their desk.Relax and calm your mind and body with this expandable breathing ball techniques.
【Nice Gift】Unique novel toys attracts attention,easy to carry, you can play in office, home,school,outdoors, travel, party, etc.Birthday and Holiday gifts for kids, family and friends.
description: Product description Specification: Name: Expandable Breathing Ball Toy Age: Over 3 years old Material: ABS L(about): 18cm (unstretched), 34cm (stretched) M(about): 13cm (unstretched), 26cm (stretched) Package: Inflatable Color Ball Inflatable Magic Ball*1 Directions Expand and squeeze the toy to change its size.
